description_long: This object consists of a group of six books, five of which are closed and standing upright in a row, while one is open and lying flat. The closed books display a variety of cover colors and textures, including brown, green, and red, with some featuring decorative patterns or symbols on their covers. The open book reveals aged, slightly yellowed pages with visible text and illustrations, suggesting frequent use or age. The spines of the standing books are detailed, with some showing horizontal bands and subtle ornamentation. The covers appear to be made of leather or faux-leather, with a matte, slightly worn finish. The overall appearance suggests these are vintage or antique books, possibly used for study or display in an urban park, sidewalk bookstall, or neighborhood library setting.
description: A group of six vintage books, five closed and upright with ornate covers, and one open showing aged pages and text.
description_view_0: Five closed books are seen standing upright in a row, with an open book lying flat to the right, revealing its pages.
description_view_1: The front covers of the standing books are visible, showing decorative patterns and a variety of colors; the open book's pages are also visible from above.
description_view_2: The backs and spines of the books are visible, with the open book's pages facing forward, highlighting the book's thickness and page texture.
description_view_3: The tops of the books are visible, showing the thickness and page edges of the closed books, as well as the open book's spread.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover of the most visible book features a decorative, symmetrical pattern resembling a floral or geometric motif, rendered in a faded gold or beige color. The style is ornate and vintage, with an aged, classic appearance.
attribute_spine_design: The spines display a mix of horizontal bands and subtle decorative elements, with some featuring faded gold or beige patterns. No clear text is visible on the spines.
